title: Faithful: PAECloudsV param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 10.2 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAECloudsV must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAECloudsV to range extremes across hosts ['Stylized__Close_and_Open'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=10.18 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAECloudsV implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAECloudsV` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts.
